summary: Artifact-only mapping is fixed, but usage-report examples, current-bound evidence metadata, and required regression fixtures are still incomplete.
inspection_summary: Inspected HEAD 65738829b6876c9583de19b50c7ea1d1a9b87def, requested source/artifacts/tests, and ran the focused traceability tests successfully.
judgment_delta: artifact/pr-body/gate-dag presence alone concern -> fixed in source and focused test because pr_artifact is excluded from strong clause evidence and the no-verification pr prepare test stays weakly_mapped, not mapped
output surfaces concern -> partially fixed because PR body and Gate DAG include weakly_mapped/unmapped counts and examples, but usage report only renders compact counts and omits examples/details

mapped evidence schema concern -> partially fixed because mapped_evidence includes artifact_quality, strength, and target_match, but generated mapped evidence does not expose current-bound binding despite current git_context being available in verification-evidence.json

regression fixture concern -> not fully fixed because tests cover artifact-present weak mapping and AC-bound evidence, but do not assert an unmapped AC or construct/assert scenario clause missing/weak coverage

findings.detail: mapped_evidence does not expose current-bound/head metadata
unmapped AC and scenario clause fixtures are incomplete
